fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: Title for the flights results page. If not provided, a default title will be generated.

fields.name: subtitle
fields.label: Subtitle
fields.description: Optional subtitle or description for the flights results page.

fields.name: defaultFrom
fields.label: Default From Airport
fields.description: Default 'from' airport code (e.g., WAW, AMS). Used when URL parameters are not present.

fields.name: defaultTo
fields.label: Default To Airport
fields.description: Default 'to' airport code (e.g., TQO, JFK). Used when URL parameters are not present.

fields.name: defaultDate
fields.label: Default Date
fields.description: Default date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Used when URL parameters are not present.

fields.name: apiUrl
fields.label: API URL
fields.description: Optional API URL for fetching flight data. If not provided, sample data will be used.

fields.name: flightImages
fields.label: Flight Images
fields.description: Multiple images for flights. Images will be assigned to flights in order.
